items.title: AMD's upcoming RDNA 5 GPUs might improve dual-issue execution & use shader units more efficiently — LLVM patch adds new FMA instruction to ease compiling
items.description: A new LLVM patch has added V_FMA_F32, a 3-operand fused multiply-add (FMA instruction and introduced the VOPD3 instruction format for RDNA 5. Both of these changes should make it easier for compilers to use dual issue execution, working around the strict pairing rules that would otherwise limit max FP32 throughput in certain workloads.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter The next generation of Radeon GPUs from AMD are expected to be a significant upgrade over RDNA 4, and one of the issues Team Red seems to be tackling is dual issue execution. That's the GPU's ability to execute two instructions in the same cycle — AMD's cards have had this feature since RDNA 3, but strict pairing rules meant that compilers couldn't always take advantage of it, limiting theoretical peak performance. A new LLVM patch now suggests that AMD will be solving this on RDNA 5.Go deeper with TH Premium: GPUs (Image credit: Noctua)Desktop RoadmapEnterprise RoadmapRubin in-depthThe Stout Owl: The ultimate Noctua G2 PCCoelacanth's Dream, a Linux-focused outlet, examined the new changes and found out they reference gfx13, which is derived from gfx130, aka RDNA 5. AMD is apparently adding a new instruction format called "VOPD3" that is designed to better interface with the dual issue VALU (Vector Arithmetic Logic Unit; shader unit). It should be more lenient, making it easier for the compiler to use dual issue execution.On a technical level, the existing system, known as VOPD, largely only worked with simpler 2-operand instructions, which made it harder for compilers to schedule compatible instruction pairs. VOPD3 will expand this to 3-operand instructions, so it would be able to support operations like fused multiply-add (FMA). In fact, V_FMA_F32 was added in this very pull request and that's how we can infer it'll be on RDNA 5.Article continues below You may like ISSCC 2026: AMD discloses how the Instinct MI355X doubled per-CU throughput despite lower compute unit count Shader Execution Reordering part of new DirectX update boosts FPS by 90% in Intel Arc B-series GPUs AMD unwraps Instinct MI500 boasting 1,000X more performance versus MI300X This would allow dual issue execution to happen more often, leading to a potentially massive increase in FP32 throughput (in some cases). Shader units will spend less time waiting for clock cycles and instead get more work done, making each instruction more efficient. This could help in demanding scenarios, such as rendering, which means game engines will be able to able to optimize for dual issue VALU.Reducing the number of cases where pairing fails due to restrictions is a key step to making the hardware more efficient without brute-forcing IPC uplifts through silicon. FMA instructions are also important when it comes to neural rendering, so things like upscaling and frame-gen tech can also get a boost here, even if the hardware itself is not more performant — since dual issue execution improves efficiency regardless.You can check out the Coelacanth's Dream article linked above if you're interested in more specifics, but be warned that it's very dense. Moreover, RDNA 5 is a ways out at this point, and more consumer-facing updates like higher core counts would certainly be a more marketable trait. Still, seeing a GPU reach its advertised FP32 throughput more easily and more consistently is a big architectural win. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: AMD新一代RDNA 5显卡或将优化双指令执行与着色器单元利用率——LLVM补丁新增FMA指令简化编译流程
items.descriptionZh:
根据Tom's Hardware的报道，AMD下一代Radeon GPU架构RDNA 5预计将带来显著升级，其中一个关键改进方向是优化**双指令发射（dual issue execution）**能力。这项技术允许GPU在每个时钟周期内执行两条指令，自RDNA 3架构起便已引入，但由于此前严格的指令配对规则限制，编译器往往难以充分利用该功能，从而限制了理论峰值性能的发挥。

最新提交的**LLVM编译器补丁**揭示了AMD的解决方案。补丁中引用了代号为“gfx13”（源自gfx130，即RDNA 5）的架构，并新增了一种名为 **“VOPD3”** 的指令格式。该格式旨在更好地与支持双指令发射的**向量算术逻辑单元（VALU，即着色器单元）** 对接，其规则更为宽松，将使编译器更易于调度和利用双指令发射。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
在技术层面，现有的**VOPD**系统主要只能处理较简单的**2操作数指令**，这严重限制了编译器寻找可配对指令组合的灵活性。而新的**VOPD3格式将支持3操作数指令**，从而能够容纳如**融合乘加（FMA）** 这类更复杂且重要的操作。事实上，在该补丁请求中就已添加了`V_FMA_F32`指令，这直接证实了FMA支持将出现在RDNA 5上。

**性能影响与应用场景**
这一改进意味着双指令发射将在更多情况下被触发，有望在特定场景下带来**FP32吞吐量的巨大提升**。着色器单元闲置等待的时钟周期将减少，指令执行效率得到提高。这对于**高负载的渲染场景**尤为有利，游戏引擎将能更好地针对双发射VALU进行优化。

降低因配对限制而导致的失败案例，是在不依赖单纯增加硅片面积来提升IPC（每时钟周期指令数）的情况下，提高硬件效率的关键一步。同时，FMA指令对**神经渲染**至关重要，因此**分辨率提升技术（如超分辨率）和帧生成技术**也有望从中获益——即使硬件本身的理论算力没有增加，但双指令发射带来的效率提升同样能增强这些功能的实际表现。

**总结**
尽管RDNA 5的正式发布尚需时日，且面向消费者的升级（如更高的核心数量）通常是更受市场关注的特性，但此项架构改进意义重大。它使得GPU能够更轻松、更稳定地达到其标称的FP32吞吐量，代表了**AMD在GPU微架构设计上的一项重要进步**，旨在通过软件与硬件的协同优化来充分释放硬件潜力。

items.title: AI companies want to harvest improv actors’ skills to train AI on human emotion
items.description:
If you've got strong creative instincts, the ability to authentically portray emotion, and are capable of staying true to a character's voice throughout a scene, there's a job listing calling for your experience. 
The catch: You won't be performing in a theater, a film studio, or an underground performance space. You'd be using your talents to train an AI model for "one of the leading AI companies," according to the open role posted by Handshake, a company that provides training data to OpenAI and other labs. 
Handshake AI is one of a handful of companies of its kind, scrambling to provide more and more niche or specific training data to A …
Read the full story at The Verge.
items.content: If you’ve got strong creative instincts, the ability to authentically portray emotion, and are capable of staying true to a character’s voice throughout a scene, there’s a job listing calling for your experience.The catch: You won’t be performing in a theater, a film studio, or an underground performance space. You’d be using your talents to train an AI model for “one of the leading AI companies,” according to the open role posted by Handshake, a company that provides training data to OpenAI and other labs.Handshake AI is one of a handful of companies of its kind, scrambling to provide more and more niche or specific training data to AI labs in order to feed the models. AI models are often described as “jagged,” meaning they’re typically great at some surprisingly complex tasks but fail deeply at some simple ones. AI companies are trying to fix the gaps in their models’ knowledge with specialized data labeling, and companies like Handshake, Mercor, and Scale AI have adjusted accordingly, hiring professionals in a wide range of industries.Handshake’s demand for training data tripled last summer, as The Verge reported in December, and the company surpassed a $150 million run rate in November, scrambling to keep up with demand. Handshake and its competitors have touted their networks of tens of thousands (or more) professionals in white-collar industries, from chemists and doctors to lawyers and screenwriters. Many of these professionals worry they’re training AI models in a way that will make their careers obsolete even quicker than may have happened otherwise.And now the leading AI labs have come for sketch comics, improv actors, and more.“Handshake AI is inviting actors, improvisers, and performers to join a paid, collaborative improv project to work with one of the leading AI companies,” the job description says, promising participants will be “matched with other performers over video and given a light prompt or scenario to explore together.”The job listing calls for people with a background in acting, improv, sketch, or theater work of any kind, and it takes pains to imply — multiple times — that it’s looking for people who can essentially “test the limits of the world’s top LLMs’ understanding” by teaching the models how to recognize or replicate human tone and emotions. “Emotional awareness” is one of the requirements, for instance, specifically the “ability to recognize, express, and shift between emotions in a way that feels authentic and human.” The job listing also called for “interactions that feel grounded, human, and fun to play.”Handshake declined to comment, and the listing does not specify what the training data will be used for.In recent years, AI companies have leaned fully into “multimodal” models that can not only generate images and video, but also speak with users via voice interactions, complete with realistic inflections. After OpenAI first tested out ChatGPT’s voice mode, the company leaned further into the feature in 2024, when it debuted an Advanced version with a suite of different voices to choose from. Elon Musk’s xAI offers voice chat within Grok. And Anthropic’s Claude has offered a voice feature, at least in beta, since last May.The Handshake job listing goes on to say that sessions are “unscripted and open-ended,” adding that participants will “improvise scenes, explore characters, and respond naturally in the moment, with plenty of creative freedom to shape how each interaction unfolds.” The role also promises part-time, flexible tasks that are “easy to fit alongside auditions, classes, or rehearsals,” with an average pay of $74 per hour. But as The Verge recently reported, these projects’ starting pay often dwindles quickly once a participant signs up, and the flexible nature of the schedule doesn’t seem so flexible when workers are competing for a limited number of new tasks that can become available, or go away, at any moment.Members of the r/improv community on Reddit have discussed the Handshake AI job listing at length, with some calling it “dystopian.” One user wrote, “It’s clearly just an attempt to get people to train AI models to create AI generated videos.” A second wrote, “I think they are trying to teach it human conversation not how to be an improviser. My plan was to sabotage the inputs.” Another joked, “Now AI is coming for our lucrative improv comedy jobs.”Another user wrote, “I predict a resurgence of live comedy from people being sick of online services and wanting some rough around the edges, real, face-to-face entertainment. I think that could be a great marketing angle for improv teams: come see real, unpolished, laugh out loud comedy, NOT made by a computer.”
items.author: Hayden Field
items.titleZh: AI公司欲采集即兴表演演员的技能，训练人工智能识别人类情感
items.descriptionZh:
近期，一家为OpenAI等顶尖人工智能实验室提供训练数据的公司Handshake AI，发布了一则不同寻常的招聘启事：招募拥有表演、即兴创作或剧场工作背景的专业人士，通过即兴互动来训练AI模型。这折射出AI行业竞争的一个新前沿——为追求更自然、更具情感表现力的人机交互，AI公司正将目光投向艺术领域，以获取高度专业化、高质量的训练数据。

**背景与行业需求**
随着多模态大模型的快速发展，AI不仅需要处理文本和图像，还需生成富有情感色彩的语音对话、视频内容，并对人类的语调、情绪做出细腻的回应。然而，当前的AI模型普遍存在“参差不齐”的问题——能出色完成某些复杂任务，却在一些基础的情感表达和情境反应上表现拙劣。为了填补这些“能力缺口”，AI实验室对高质量、高针对性的训练数据需求激增。以Handshake、Scale AI为代表的数据服务公司应运而生，它们建立了庞大的专业人才网络，涵盖化学家、医生、律师、编剧等各领域专家，为AI模型进行精细化数据标注和训练。据报道，Handshake的培训数据需求在去年夏季增长了两倍，公司在11月实现了超过1.5亿美元的年度营收规模。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
此次招聘的核心创新在于，直接利用即兴表演艺术家的核心技能来“教导”AI模型理解和模仿人类情感与互动。传统的数据标注往往是对静态文本或图像进行分类，而这项任务要求参与者通过实时、无剧本的视频互动，创造“真实、人性化且有趣”的对话场景。具体要求包括：
- **情感感知能力**：能够识别、表达并在不同情绪间自然转换。
- **角色一致性**：在整个场景中保持角色声音和性格的真实性。
- **即兴创作**：根据简单提示或场景，与其他表演者协作，自然展开互动。
本质上，这是一场大规模的人类行为“数据采集”，旨在捕捉人类对话中微妙的情感流动、即兴反应和幽默感，从而训练AI在语音交互和内容生成中表现出更丰富、更可信的“人性化”特质。

**性能目标与技术影响**
通过此类训练，AI公司的目标是提升模型在以下方面的性能：
- **语音交互的真实感**：使AI语音助手（如OpenAI的ChatGPT语音高级版、xAI的Grok语音聊天、Anthropic的Claude语音测试版）的对话更自然，富有情感起伏和语境适应性。
- **视频内容生成**：为未来生成具有连贯情节、合理情感表达的视频内容奠定基础。
- **多模态理解**：增强AI综合理解语言、语调、语境及非文字信息的能力。
这一趋势标志着AI训练数据采集正从广泛的网络信息爬取，转向针对特定弱点的、由领域专家驱动的“精调”阶段。

**应用场景与争议**
尽管这份工作提供高达每小时74美元的平均报酬，并承诺灵活的兼职时间，但其背后引发了行业深层的忧虑与伦理争议。许多参与其中的专业人士担心，他们正在亲手训练可能取代自己工作的工具。在Reddit的即兴表演社区中，相关讨论十分激烈，用户反应各异：
- 有人直言这是“反乌托邦”的，认为其本质是让人训练AI以生成AI视频，最终威胁真人表演者的生计。
- 有用户表示计划“ sabotaging the inputs”（故意输入错误信息）。
- 也有观点认为，这或许是传统现场艺术的生机——当线上服务和AI内容泛滥时，观众可能更渴望“粗糙但真实”的面对面现场娱乐，这反而成为真人即兴喜剧团队的独特卖点。

**结论**
Handshake的招聘事件揭示了AI发展进程中的一个关键矛盾：在追求技术极致体验的过程中，行业不得不向最富有人类创造力的领域寻求“养料”。这不仅加速了AI在情感计算和创造性表达方面的进步，也切实地对创意职业构成了替代性挑战。未来，如何在技术进步与人文价值之间找到平衡，将是整个行业必须面对的课题。

items.title: Chinese GPU-maker Lisuan flaunts new design details for its LX 7G100 gaming card, also updates LX GPU product pages with server and workstation specs
items.description: Meanwhile, the older 7G105 GPU name no longer appears on the site; all four cards now sit under the LX product branding.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 1 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Lisuan Tech has updated its official product pages and flaunted new design details for its LX 7G100 gaming card. The firm also filled out the expanded specification listings for the LX Ultra, LX Pro, and LX Max professional GPUs, filling in server-specific specs for the LX Ultra — including 16-way virtual GPU support, confidential computing protection, data encryption, and secure display — that hadn’t previously been disclosed by the company. Meanwhile, the older 7G105 GPU name no longer appears on the site; all four cards now sit under the LX product branding.The LX Ultra is the most server-oriented card in the lineup, listed with 24GB of GDDR6, ECC support, a pixel fill rate of up to 192 GP/s, a texture fill rate of up to 384 GT/s, and FP32 throughput of up to 24 TFLOPS. Its video codec figures are different from the rest of the GPUs, with a 16x 1080p60 decode and 8x 1080p60 encode, compared to HEVC 8K60 decode and HEVC 8K30 encode on the workstation-class and gaming models. The LX Ultra uses a blower-style cooler, targets servers and rack-mounted all-in-one systems, and carries no listed display outputs or API support on the updated page.The LX Pro and LX Max, meanwhile, share a closer feature set, with both carrying four DisplayPort 1.4a outputs with 8K60 HDR, FreeSync, and DSC support, HEVC 8K video codec figures, and DirectX 12, Vulkan 1.3, OpenGL 4.6, and OpenCL 3.0. The LX Pro ships with 24GB of GDDR6 and targets workstation tower deployments, while the LX Max steps down to 12GB for general workstation use. Both use axial cooling.Article continues below You may like Lisuan's homegrown 6nm G100 series GPUs launches June 18 in China with support for popular Steam games Lisuan's G100 series has reportedly begun shipping out to customers, China's first 6nm discrete GPUs Moore Threads unveils next-gen gaming GPU with 15x performance and 50x ray tracing improvement Swipe to scroll horizontallyRow 0 - Cell 0 LX 7G100 (Consumer)LX Ultra (Professional)LX Pro (Professional)LX Max (Professional)Memory Capacity12GB24GB24GB12GBMemory TypeGDDR6GDDR6 w/ ECCGDDR6GDDR6Display Outputs4x DisplayPort 1.4aN/A4x DisplayPort 1.4a4× DisplayPort 1.4aDisplay Support8K @ 60Hz, HDR, FreeSync, DSCN/A8K @ 60Hz, HDR, FreeSync, DSC8K @ 60Hz, HDR, FreeSync, DSCFP32 Performance-Up to 24 TFLOPS--Virtual GPU-16-way virtualization-Row 6 - Cell 4 CoolingAxial fan, activeBlower fan, activeAxial fan, activeAxial fan, activePlatformPC, workstationServer, rack mountWorkstation, all-in-oneWorkstationFinally, the consumer LX 7G100 gaming card appears on the same page with the same core specs confirmed at AWE 2026: 12GB GDDR6, 192 TMUs, 96 ROPs, PCIe 4.0 x16, and up to 225W board power through a single 8-pin connector. The card offers four DisplayPort 1.4a outputs and no HDMI. New product renders confirm that the gaming card uses a triple-fan cooler with two fans partially concealed under the shroud, resolving earlier ambiguity created by earlier renders that suggested a blower-style design.Lisuan has still not published clock speeds, memory bus widths, board power figures, or the GPU die configuration for any of the LX professional cards. Pre-orders for the gaming card open on March 17, ahead of the June 18 retail launch in China. items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: 中国GPU制造商丽算秀出LX 7G100游戏显卡新设计细节，同步更新服务器与工作站规格的产品页面
items.descriptionZh:
理算科技（Lisuan Tech）近日更新了其官方网站产品页面，进一步披露了基于6nm G100系列GPU的多款产品详细规格。此次更新涵盖了面向游戏市场的消费级显卡LX 7G100，以及三款面向专业领域的型号：LX Ultra、LX Pro和LX Max。同时，旧型号7G105的名称已从网站上移除，整个系列统一在LX品牌之下。

此次更新的核心在于完善了专业级GPU，特别是服务器型号LX Ultra的规格细节。LX Ultra是系列中最专注于服务器和机架式一体机应用的产品，其公布的特性包括：配备24GB支持ECC的GDDR6显存，像素填充率最高达192 GP/s，纹理填充率最高达384 GT/s，单精度浮点性能（FP32）最高为24 TFLOPS。其显著的专业特性包括支持16路虚拟GPU（vGPU）、机密计算保护、数据加密和安全显示功能，这些均是此前未公开的。在视频编解码方面，LX Ultra侧重于多路流处理，支持16路1080p60解码和8路1080p60编码，这与面向工作站和游戏、支持HEVC 8K60解码和8K30编码的其他型号有所不同。该卡采用鼓风机式（blower-style）主动散热设计，产品页面上未列出任何显示输出接口或具体的API支持，这印证了其纯粹的服务器计算卡定位。

相比之下，LX Pro和LX Max更偏向于传统工作站应用。两者共享大部分特性：均配备4个DisplayPort 1.4a输出，支持8K60 HDR、FreeSync和显示流压缩（DSC）；支持HEVC 8K编解码；并兼容DirectX 12、Vulkan 1.3、OpenGL 4.6和OpenCL 3.0等主流图形与计算API。两者的主要区别在于显存配置和定位：LX Pro配备24GB GDDR6显存，针对塔式工作站部署；而LX Max则配备12GB GDDR6显存，适用于通用工作站场景。这两款显卡均采用轴向风扇（axial fan）主动散热方案。

对于消费级游戏显卡LX 7G100，此次更新确认了其在AWE 2026上公布的核心规格：12GB GDDR6显存，192个纹理映射单元（TMUs），96个光栅操作单元（ROPs），PCIe 4.0 x16接口，以及通过单个8针供电接口实现的最高225W板卡功耗。显示输出方面，它提供四个DisplayPort 1.4a接口，未配备HDMI接口。新的产品渲染图明确了该卡将采用三风扇散热设计，其中有两个风扇部分被外壳遮盖，这澄清了早期渲染图可能带来的、关于其采用鼓风机设计的误解。

目前，理算科技仍未公布任何一款LX专业显卡的核心频率、显存位宽、精确的板卡功耗以及GPU芯片的详细配置信息。根据安排，消费级游戏显卡LX 7G100将于3月17日开启预售，并于6月18日在中国市场正式零售上市。

此次产品线的明确划分与规格披露，标志着理算科技正系统性地布局从高性能计算、虚拟化服务器、专业工作站到消费级游戏的完整GPU产品矩阵，旨在不同细分市场与国际巨头展开竞争。

history.title: AMD's upcoming RDNA 5 GPUs might improve dual-issue execution & use shader units more efficiently — LLVM patch adds new FMA instruction to ease compiling
history.description: A new LLVM patch has added V_FMA_F32, a 3-operand fused multiply-add (FMA instruction and introduced the VOPD3 instruction format for RDNA 5. Both of these changes should make it easier for compilers to use dual issue execution, working around the strict pairing rules that would otherwise limit max FP32 throughput in certain workloads.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter The next generation of Radeon GPUs from AMD are expected to be a significant upgrade over RDNA 4, and one of the issues Team Red seems to be tackling is dual issue execution. That's the GPU's ability to execute two instructions in the same cycle — AMD's cards have had this feature since RDNA 3, but strict pairing rules meant that compilers couldn't always take advantage of it, limiting theoretical peak performance. A new LLVM patch now suggests that AMD will be solving this on RDNA 5.Go deeper with TH Premium: GPUs (Image credit: Noctua)Desktop RoadmapEnterprise RoadmapRubin in-depthThe Stout Owl: The ultimate Noctua G2 PCCoelacanth's Dream, a Linux-focused outlet, examined the new changes and found out they reference gfx13, which is derived from gfx130, aka RDNA 5. AMD is apparently adding a new instruction format called "VOPD3" that is designed to better interface with the dual issue VALU (Vector Arithmetic Logic Unit; shader unit). It should be more lenient, making it easier for the compiler to use dual issue execution.On a technical level, the existing system, known as VOPD, largely only worked with simpler 2-operand instructions, which made it harder for compilers to schedule compatible instruction pairs. VOPD3 will expand this to 3-operand instructions, so it would be able to support operations like fused multiply-add (FMA). In fact, V_FMA_F32 was added in this very pull request and that's how we can infer it'll be on RDNA 5.Article continues below You may like ISSCC 2026: AMD discloses how the Instinct MI355X doubled per-CU throughput despite lower compute unit count Shader Execution Reordering part of new DirectX update boosts FPS by 90% in Intel Arc B-series GPUs AMD unwraps Instinct MI500 boasting 1,000X more performance versus MI300X This would allow dual issue execution to happen more often, leading to a potentially massive increase in FP32 throughput (in some cases). Shader units will spend less time waiting for clock cycles and instead get more work done, making each instruction more efficient. This could help in demanding scenarios, such as rendering, which means game engines will be able to able to optimize for dual issue VALU.Reducing the number of cases where pairing fails due to restrictions is a key step to making the hardware more efficient without brute-forcing IPC uplifts through silicon. FMA instructions are also important when it comes to neural rendering, so things like upscaling and frame-gen tech can also get a boost here, even if the hardware itself is not more performant — since dual issue execution improves efficiency regardless.You can check out the Coelacanth's Dream article linked above if you're interested in more specifics, but be warned that it's very dense. Moreover, RDNA 5 is a ways out at this point, and more consumer-facing updates like higher core counts would certainly be a more marketable trait. Still, seeing a GPU reach its advertised FP32 throughput more easily and more consistently is a big architectural win. history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: AMD新一代RDNA 5显卡或将优化双指令执行与着色器单元利用率——LLVM补丁新增FMA指令简化编译流程
history.descriptionZh:
根据Tom's Hardware的报道，AMD下一代Radeon GPU架构RDNA 5预计将带来显著升级，其中一个关键改进方向是优化**双指令发射（dual issue execution）**能力。这项技术允许GPU在每个时钟周期内执行两条指令，自RDNA 3架构起便已引入，但由于此前严格的指令配对规则限制，编译器往往难以充分利用该功能，从而限制了理论峰值性能的发挥。

最新提交的**LLVM编译器补丁**揭示了AMD的解决方案。补丁中引用了代号为“gfx13”（源自gfx130，即RDNA 5）的架构，并新增了一种名为 **“VOPD3”** 的指令格式。该格式旨在更好地与支持双指令发射的**向量算术逻辑单元（VALU，即着色器单元）** 对接，其规则更为宽松，将使编译器更易于调度和利用双指令发射。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
在技术层面，现有的**VOPD**系统主要只能处理较简单的**2操作数指令**，这严重限制了编译器寻找可配对指令组合的灵活性。而新的**VOPD3格式将支持3操作数指令**，从而能够容纳如**融合乘加（FMA）** 这类更复杂且重要的操作。事实上，在该补丁请求中就已添加了`V_FMA_F32`指令，这直接证实了FMA支持将出现在RDNA 5上。

**性能影响与应用场景**
这一改进意味着双指令发射将在更多情况下被触发，有望在特定场景下带来**FP32吞吐量的巨大提升**。着色器单元闲置等待的时钟周期将减少，指令执行效率得到提高。这对于**高负载的渲染场景**尤为有利，游戏引擎将能更好地针对双发射VALU进行优化。

降低因配对限制而导致的失败案例，是在不依赖单纯增加硅片面积来提升IPC（每时钟周期指令数）的情况下，提高硬件效率的关键一步。同时，FMA指令对**神经渲染**至关重要，因此**分辨率提升技术（如超分辨率）和帧生成技术**也有望从中获益——即使硬件本身的理论算力没有增加，但双指令发射带来的效率提升同样能增强这些功能的实际表现。

**总结**
尽管RDNA 5的正式发布尚需时日，且面向消费者的升级（如更高的核心数量）通常是更受市场关注的特性，但此项架构改进意义重大。它使得GPU能够更轻松、更稳定地达到其标称的FP32吞吐量，代表了**AMD在GPU微架构设计上的一项重要进步**，旨在通过软件与硬件的协同优化来充分释放硬件潜力。

history.title: AI companies want to harvest improv actors’ skills to train AI on human emotion
history.description:
If you've got strong creative instincts, the ability to authentically portray emotion, and are capable of staying true to a character's voice throughout a scene, there's a job listing calling for your experience. 
The catch: You won't be performing in a theater, a film studio, or an underground performance space. You'd be using your talents to train an AI model for "one of the leading AI companies," according to the open role posted by Handshake, a company that provides training data to OpenAI and other labs. 
Handshake AI is one of a handful of companies of its kind, scrambling to provide more and more niche or specific training data to A …
Read the full story at The Verge.
history.content: If you’ve got strong creative instincts, the ability to authentically portray emotion, and are capable of staying true to a character’s voice throughout a scene, there’s a job listing calling for your experience.The catch: You won’t be performing in a theater, a film studio, or an underground performance space. You’d be using your talents to train an AI model for “one of the leading AI companies,” according to the open role posted by Handshake, a company that provides training data to OpenAI and other labs.Handshake AI is one of a handful of companies of its kind, scrambling to provide more and more niche or specific training data to AI labs in order to feed the models. AI models are often described as “jagged,” meaning they’re typically great at some surprisingly complex tasks but fail deeply at some simple ones. AI companies are trying to fix the gaps in their models’ knowledge with specialized data labeling, and companies like Handshake, Mercor, and Scale AI have adjusted accordingly, hiring professionals in a wide range of industries.Handshake’s demand for training data tripled last summer, as The Verge reported in December, and the company surpassed a $150 million run rate in November, scrambling to keep up with demand. Handshake and its competitors have touted their networks of tens of thousands (or more) professionals in white-collar industries, from chemists and doctors to lawyers and screenwriters. Many of these professionals worry they’re training AI models in a way that will make their careers obsolete even quicker than may have happened otherwise.And now the leading AI labs have come for sketch comics, improv actors, and more.“Handshake AI is inviting actors, improvisers, and performers to join a paid, collaborative improv project to work with one of the leading AI companies,” the job description says, promising participants will be “matched with other performers over video and given a light prompt or scenario to explore together.”The job listing calls for people with a background in acting, improv, sketch, or theater work of any kind, and it takes pains to imply — multiple times — that it’s looking for people who can essentially “test the limits of the world’s top LLMs’ understanding” by teaching the models how to recognize or replicate human tone and emotions. “Emotional awareness” is one of the requirements, for instance, specifically the “ability to recognize, express, and shift between emotions in a way that feels authentic and human.” The job listing also called for “interactions that feel grounded, human, and fun to play.”Handshake declined to comment, and the listing does not specify what the training data will be used for.In recent years, AI companies have leaned fully into “multimodal” models that can not only generate images and video, but also speak with users via voice interactions, complete with realistic inflections. After OpenAI first tested out ChatGPT’s voice mode, the company leaned further into the feature in 2024, when it debuted an Advanced version with a suite of different voices to choose from. Elon Musk’s xAI offers voice chat within Grok. And Anthropic’s Claude has offered a voice feature, at least in beta, since last May.The Handshake job listing goes on to say that sessions are “unscripted and open-ended,” adding that participants will “improvise scenes, explore characters, and respond naturally in the moment, with plenty of creative freedom to shape how each interaction unfolds.” The role also promises part-time, flexible tasks that are “easy to fit alongside auditions, classes, or rehearsals,” with an average pay of $74 per hour. But as The Verge recently reported, these projects’ starting pay often dwindles quickly once a participant signs up, and the flexible nature of the schedule doesn’t seem so flexible when workers are competing for a limited number of new tasks that can become available, or go away, at any moment.Members of the r/improv community on Reddit have discussed the Handshake AI job listing at length, with some calling it “dystopian.” One user wrote, “It’s clearly just an attempt to get people to train AI models to create AI generated videos.” A second wrote, “I think they are trying to teach it human conversation not how to be an improviser. My plan was to sabotage the inputs.” Another joked, “Now AI is coming for our lucrative improv comedy jobs.”Another user wrote, “I predict a resurgence of live comedy from people being sick of online services and wanting some rough around the edges, real, face-to-face entertainment. I think that could be a great marketing angle for improv teams: come see real, unpolished, laugh out loud comedy, NOT made by a computer.”
history.author: Hayden Field
history.titleZh: AI公司欲采集即兴表演演员的技能，训练人工智能识别人类情感
history.descriptionZh:
近期，一家为OpenAI等顶尖人工智能实验室提供训练数据的公司Handshake AI，发布了一则不同寻常的招聘启事：招募拥有表演、即兴创作或剧场工作背景的专业人士，通过即兴互动来训练AI模型。这折射出AI行业竞争的一个新前沿——为追求更自然、更具情感表现力的人机交互，AI公司正将目光投向艺术领域，以获取高度专业化、高质量的训练数据。

**背景与行业需求**
随着多模态大模型的快速发展，AI不仅需要处理文本和图像，还需生成富有情感色彩的语音对话、视频内容，并对人类的语调、情绪做出细腻的回应。然而，当前的AI模型普遍存在“参差不齐”的问题——能出色完成某些复杂任务，却在一些基础的情感表达和情境反应上表现拙劣。为了填补这些“能力缺口”，AI实验室对高质量、高针对性的训练数据需求激增。以Handshake、Scale AI为代表的数据服务公司应运而生，它们建立了庞大的专业人才网络，涵盖化学家、医生、律师、编剧等各领域专家，为AI模型进行精细化数据标注和训练。据报道，Handshake的培训数据需求在去年夏季增长了两倍，公司在11月实现了超过1.5亿美元的年度营收规模。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
此次招聘的核心创新在于，直接利用即兴表演艺术家的核心技能来“教导”AI模型理解和模仿人类情感与互动。传统的数据标注往往是对静态文本或图像进行分类，而这项任务要求参与者通过实时、无剧本的视频互动，创造“真实、人性化且有趣”的对话场景。具体要求包括：
- **情感感知能力**：能够识别、表达并在不同情绪间自然转换。
- **角色一致性**：在整个场景中保持角色声音和性格的真实性。
- **即兴创作**：根据简单提示或场景，与其他表演者协作，自然展开互动。
本质上，这是一场大规模的人类行为“数据采集”，旨在捕捉人类对话中微妙的情感流动、即兴反应和幽默感，从而训练AI在语音交互和内容生成中表现出更丰富、更可信的“人性化”特质。

**性能目标与技术影响**
通过此类训练，AI公司的目标是提升模型在以下方面的性能：
- **语音交互的真实感**：使AI语音助手（如OpenAI的ChatGPT语音高级版、xAI的Grok语音聊天、Anthropic的Claude语音测试版）的对话更自然，富有情感起伏和语境适应性。
- **视频内容生成**：为未来生成具有连贯情节、合理情感表达的视频内容奠定基础。
- **多模态理解**：增强AI综合理解语言、语调、语境及非文字信息的能力。
这一趋势标志着AI训练数据采集正从广泛的网络信息爬取，转向针对特定弱点的、由领域专家驱动的“精调”阶段。

**应用场景与争议**
尽管这份工作提供高达每小时74美元的平均报酬，并承诺灵活的兼职时间，但其背后引发了行业深层的忧虑与伦理争议。许多参与其中的专业人士担心，他们正在亲手训练可能取代自己工作的工具。在Reddit的即兴表演社区中，相关讨论十分激烈，用户反应各异：
- 有人直言这是“反乌托邦”的，认为其本质是让人训练AI以生成AI视频，最终威胁真人表演者的生计。
- 有用户表示计划“ sabotaging the inputs”（故意输入错误信息）。
- 也有观点认为，这或许是传统现场艺术的生机——当线上服务和AI内容泛滥时，观众可能更渴望“粗糙但真实”的面对面现场娱乐，这反而成为真人即兴喜剧团队的独特卖点。

**结论**
Handshake的招聘事件揭示了AI发展进程中的一个关键矛盾：在追求技术极致体验的过程中，行业不得不向最富有人类创造力的领域寻求“养料”。这不仅加速了AI在情感计算和创造性表达方面的进步，也切实地对创意职业构成了替代性挑战。未来，如何在技术进步与人文价值之间找到平衡，将是整个行业必须面对的课题。

history.title: Chinese GPU-maker Lisuan flaunts new design details for its LX 7G100 gaming card, also updates LX GPU product pages with server and workstation specs
history.description: Meanwhile, the older 7G105 GPU name no longer appears on the site; all four cards now sit under the LX product branding.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 1 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Lisuan Tech has updated its official product pages and flaunted new design details for its LX 7G100 gaming card. The firm also filled out the expanded specification listings for the LX Ultra, LX Pro, and LX Max professional GPUs, filling in server-specific specs for the LX Ultra — including 16-way virtual GPU support, confidential computing protection, data encryption, and secure display — that hadn’t previously been disclosed by the company. Meanwhile, the older 7G105 GPU name no longer appears on the site; all four cards now sit under the LX product branding.The LX Ultra is the most server-oriented card in the lineup, listed with 24GB of GDDR6, ECC support, a pixel fill rate of up to 192 GP/s, a texture fill rate of up to 384 GT/s, and FP32 throughput of up to 24 TFLOPS. Its video codec figures are different from the rest of the GPUs, with a 16x 1080p60 decode and 8x 1080p60 encode, compared to HEVC 8K60 decode and HEVC 8K30 encode on the workstation-class and gaming models. The LX Ultra uses a blower-style cooler, targets servers and rack-mounted all-in-one systems, and carries no listed display outputs or API support on the updated page.The LX Pro and LX Max, meanwhile, share a closer feature set, with both carrying four DisplayPort 1.4a outputs with 8K60 HDR, FreeSync, and DSC support, HEVC 8K video codec figures, and DirectX 12, Vulkan 1.3, OpenGL 4.6, and OpenCL 3.0. The LX Pro ships with 24GB of GDDR6 and targets workstation tower deployments, while the LX Max steps down to 12GB for general workstation use. Both use axial cooling.Article continues below You may like Lisuan's homegrown 6nm G100 series GPUs launches June 18 in China with support for popular Steam games Lisuan's G100 series has reportedly begun shipping out to customers, China's first 6nm discrete GPUs Moore Threads unveils next-gen gaming GPU with 15x performance and 50x ray tracing improvement Swipe to scroll horizontallyRow 0 - Cell 0 LX 7G100 (Consumer)LX Ultra (Professional)LX Pro (Professional)LX Max (Professional)Memory Capacity12GB24GB24GB12GBMemory TypeGDDR6GDDR6 w/ ECCGDDR6GDDR6Display Outputs4x DisplayPort 1.4aN/A4x DisplayPort 1.4a4× DisplayPort 1.4aDisplay Support8K @ 60Hz, HDR, FreeSync, DSCN/A8K @ 60Hz, HDR, FreeSync, DSC8K @ 60Hz, HDR, FreeSync, DSCFP32 Performance-Up to 24 TFLOPS--Virtual GPU-16-way virtualization-Row 6 - Cell 4 CoolingAxial fan, activeBlower fan, activeAxial fan, activeAxial fan, activePlatformPC, workstationServer, rack mountWorkstation, all-in-oneWorkstationFinally, the consumer LX 7G100 gaming card appears on the same page with the same core specs confirmed at AWE 2026: 12GB GDDR6, 192 TMUs, 96 ROPs, PCIe 4.0 x16, and up to 225W board power through a single 8-pin connector. The card offers four DisplayPort 1.4a outputs and no HDMI. New product renders confirm that the gaming card uses a triple-fan cooler with two fans partially concealed under the shroud, resolving earlier ambiguity created by earlier renders that suggested a blower-style design.Lisuan has still not published clock speeds, memory bus widths, board power figures, or the GPU die configuration for any of the LX professional cards. Pre-orders for the gaming card open on March 17, ahead of the June 18 retail launch in China. history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: 中国GPU制造商丽算秀出LX 7G100游戏显卡新设计细节，同步更新服务器与工作站规格的产品页面
history.descriptionZh:
理算科技（Lisuan Tech）近日更新了其官方网站产品页面，进一步披露了基于6nm G100系列GPU的多款产品详细规格。此次更新涵盖了面向游戏市场的消费级显卡LX 7G100，以及三款面向专业领域的型号：LX Ultra、LX Pro和LX Max。同时，旧型号7G105的名称已从网站上移除，整个系列统一在LX品牌之下。

此次更新的核心在于完善了专业级GPU，特别是服务器型号LX Ultra的规格细节。LX Ultra是系列中最专注于服务器和机架式一体机应用的产品，其公布的特性包括：配备24GB支持ECC的GDDR6显存，像素填充率最高达192 GP/s，纹理填充率最高达384 GT/s，单精度浮点性能（FP32）最高为24 TFLOPS。其显著的专业特性包括支持16路虚拟GPU（vGPU）、机密计算保护、数据加密和安全显示功能，这些均是此前未公开的。在视频编解码方面，LX Ultra侧重于多路流处理，支持16路1080p60解码和8路1080p60编码，这与面向工作站和游戏、支持HEVC 8K60解码和8K30编码的其他型号有所不同。该卡采用鼓风机式（blower-style）主动散热设计，产品页面上未列出任何显示输出接口或具体的API支持，这印证了其纯粹的服务器计算卡定位。

相比之下，LX Pro和LX Max更偏向于传统工作站应用。两者共享大部分特性：均配备4个DisplayPort 1.4a输出，支持8K60 HDR、FreeSync和显示流压缩（DSC）；支持HEVC 8K编解码；并兼容DirectX 12、Vulkan 1.3、OpenGL 4.6和OpenCL 3.0等主流图形与计算API。两者的主要区别在于显存配置和定位：LX Pro配备24GB GDDR6显存，针对塔式工作站部署；而LX Max则配备12GB GDDR6显存，适用于通用工作站场景。这两款显卡均采用轴向风扇（axial fan）主动散热方案。

对于消费级游戏显卡LX 7G100，此次更新确认了其在AWE 2026上公布的核心规格：12GB GDDR6显存，192个纹理映射单元（TMUs），96个光栅操作单元（ROPs），PCIe 4.0 x16接口，以及通过单个8针供电接口实现的最高225W板卡功耗。显示输出方面，它提供四个DisplayPort 1.4a接口，未配备HDMI接口。新的产品渲染图明确了该卡将采用三风扇散热设计，其中有两个风扇部分被外壳遮盖，这澄清了早期渲染图可能带来的、关于其采用鼓风机设计的误解。

目前，理算科技仍未公布任何一款LX专业显卡的核心频率、显存位宽、精确的板卡功耗以及GPU芯片的详细配置信息。根据安排，消费级游戏显卡LX 7G100将于3月17日开启预售，并于6月18日在中国市场正式零售上市。

此次产品线的明确划分与规格披露，标志着理算科技正系统性地布局从高性能计算、虚拟化服务器、专业工作站到消费级游戏的完整GPU产品矩阵，旨在不同细分市场与国际巨头展开竞争。
